ColdWaterLoadingFixtureUnits.description: The number of cold water fixture or loading units for the plumbing fixture which denote the hydraulic load imposed based on flow rate, time of operation and frequency of use.

HotWaterLoadingFixtureUnits.description: The number of hot water fixture or loading units for the plumbing fixture which denote the hydraulic load imposed based on flow rate, time of operation and frequency of use.

DrainageLoadingFixtureUnits.description: The number of waste/drainage fixture or loading units for the plumbing fixture which denote the hydraulic load imposed based on flow rate, time of operation and frequency of use.

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
